providers.description:
## What it does

SunPump Agent Token Launch API lets agents, scripts, and applications pay with x402 and submit token launch metadata to SunPump. The gateway forwards the caller's JSON payload to the SunPump launch endpoint after payment settlement.

## Best for

- Agent workflows that need to create a meme or agent token from structured metadata.
- Operator tools that want one paid API call for token creation.
- Mainnet payment flows across TRON and BSC while using the same SunPump launch request shape.

## Request shape

POST a JSON body with `name`, `symbol`, `description`, `imageBase64`, `twitterUrl`, `telegramUrl`, `websiteUrl`, and `tweetUsername`. Keep `name` within 1-20 characters and use a unique symbol. `imageBase64` may include a base64-encoded token image; if it is empty or omitted, SunPump generates an image automatically.

## Code usage

Use `x402-cli pay` against the route for the mainnet payment chain you want. TRON Mainnet example:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402MainA","symbol":"X4M17","description":"x402 launch","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

BSC Mainnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` with `eip155:56` and the same JSON body.

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

SunPump Agent 发币 API 允许 Agent、脚本和应用先完成 x402 支付，再把发币元数据提交给 SunPump。Gateway 在支付结算后把调用方的 JSON 请求体转发到 SunPump 发币接口。

## 适合场景

- 需要基于结构化元数据创建 meme token 或 agent token 的 Agent 工作流。
- 希望用一次付费 API 调用完成发币的运营工具。
- 在 TRON 和 BSC 主网上使用同一套 SunPump 发币请求格式验证支付流程。

## 请求格式

POST JSON 请求体包含 `name`、`symbol`、`description`、`imageBase64`、`twitterUrl`、`telegramUrl`、`websiteUrl` 和 `tweetUsername`。`name` 需要保持在 1-20 个字符内，并使用唯一 symbol。`imageBase64` 可以传入 base64 编码的 token 图片；如果为空或不传，SunPump 会自动生成图片。

## 代码用法

使用 `x402-cli pay` 调用目标主网支付链对应的路由。TRON 主网示例：

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402MainA","symbol":"X4M17","description":"x402 launch","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

BSC 主网使用 `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` 和 `eip155:56`，请求体相同。
zh-CN.mainTitle: 一次付费完成 Agent 代币发行(x402)
zh-CN.subtitle: 用结构化元数据一次付费发币(meme/Agent 代币)。
zh-CN.title: SunPump
zh-CN.useCase: 适合应用、Agent 或 CLI 流程在 x402 支付成功后调用 SunPump 发币接口。根据主网支付链选择 TRON 主网或 BSC 主网路由。

providers.description:
## What it does

DefiLlama gateway over x402: read protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin metrics, multi-chain current & historical token prices with charts, and DeFi pool yields/APY — through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Agents doing DeFi research, allocation and risk screening that need TVL / fees / stablecoin data.
- Pricing and valuation workflows that need multi-chain current and historical token prices.
- Yield scouting across pools by APY, TVL and risk.

## Endpoints

- `GET /protocols` — All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
- `GET /protocol/{slug}` — Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata
- `GET /tvl/{protocol}` — Current total TVL of a protocol (lightweight)
- `GET /prices/current/{coins}` — Current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated)
- `GET /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}` — Historical USD price at a unix timestamp for one or many coins
- `GET /chart/{coins}` — Price chart (time series) for one or many coins
- `GET /percentage/{coins}` — Percentage price change over a period for one or many coins
- `GET /pools` — All yield pools with current APY, TVL, chain, project and risk flags
- `GET /chart/{pool}` — Historical APY / TVL time series for a single pool id

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet (`exact_permit`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols'
```

The same path is also served on BSC (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) at `https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/...`.

Pay with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DefiLlama 的 x402 网关:读取协议 TVL、费用/收入与稳定币指标,多链代币现价+历史价+图表,以及 DeFi 资金池收益率/APY——一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC 两条付费路由。

## 适合场景

- 需要 TVL/费用/稳定币数据做 DeFi 研究、配置与风险筛查的 Agent。
- 需要多链现价与历史价的定价/估值流程。
- 按 APY、TVL 与风险挑选资金池。

## 接口

- `GET /protocols` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/protocols`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /protocol/{slug}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/protocol/{slug}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /tvl/{protocol}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/tvl/{protocol}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /prices/current/{coins}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/prices/current/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /chart/{coins}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/chart/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /percentage/{coins}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/percentage/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /pools` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/pools`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /chart/{pool}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/chart/{pool}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网(`exact_permit`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols'
```

同一路径在 BSC(`eip155:56`,`exact_permit`)上也提供。使用 x402 CLI 付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```
zh-CN.mainTitle: 聚合 DeFi 数据 — TVL、费用、价格、收益率
zh-CN.subtitle: 付费 DeFi 决策数据,供 Agent 研究、定价与风控。
zh-CN.title: DefiLlama
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

providers.description:
## What it does

DexScreener market data over x402: search DEX trading pairs, read live price / liquidity / volume, and surface newly launched and trending tokens across major chains, through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- New-pool / meme-launch radar for agents tracking fresh listings.
- Momentum and liquidity checks before entering a position.
- Pair lookups by token address or symbol.

## Endpoints

- `GET /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}` — All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
- `GET /latest/dex/search` — Search pairs by token name/symbol/address
- `GET /token-profiles/latest/v1` — Latest token profiles (new-launch / discovery radar)

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet (`exact_permit`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}'
```

The same path is also served on BSC (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) at `https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-bsc/...`.

Pay with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DexScreener 行情的 x402 网关:搜索 DEX 交易对,读取实时价格/流动性/成交量,发现各主流链上新上线与热门代币,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 追踪新盘/meme 上新的 Agent 雷达。
- 入场前查看动量与流动性。
- 按代币地址或符号查交易对。

## 接口

- `GET /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /latest/dex/search` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/latest/dex/search`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /token-profiles/latest/v1` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/token-profiles/latest/v1`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网(`exact_permit`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}'
```

同一路径在 BSC(`eip155:56`,`exact_permit`)上也提供。使用 x402 CLI 付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

zh-CN.subtitle: 链上行情雷达:新盘、动量与流动性。

providers.description:
## What it does

DIA oracle price feeds over x402: transparent, multi-source aggregated token quotations across 80+ CEX/DEX markets for 3,000+ assets, through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Agents needing verifiable reference prices for valuation or settlement.
- Manipulation-resistant pricing as a risk or compliance check.
- Cross-checking a venue spot price against an independent oracle.

## Endpoints

- `GET /v1/quotation/{symbol}` — Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol
- `GET /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}` — Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet (`exact_permit`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

The same path is also served on BSC (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) at `https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/...`.

Pay with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DIA 预言机价格的 x402 网关:跨 80+ CEX/DEX 市场、覆盖 3000+ 资产的透明多源聚合报价,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 需要可验证参考价做估值或结算的 Agent。
- 用抗操纵价格做风控/合规校验。
- 与盘口现价交叉验证。

## 接口

- `GET /v1/quotation/{symbol}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/v1/quotation/{symbol}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网(`exact_permit`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

同一路径在 BSC(`eip155:56`,`exact_permit`)上也提供。使用 x402 CLI 付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

zh-CN.subtitle: 可验证的参考价,用于估值、结算与风控。

providers.description:
## What it does

GoPlus Security API over x402: scan token contracts and wallet addresses for risks — honeypots, buy/sell tax, mintable/blacklist/proxy permissions and known malicious addresses — through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Pre-trade safety screening before a swap.
- Wallet / address risk checks before transfers or approvals.
- Automated due-diligence inside agent trading flows.

## Endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — Malicious-address check (sanctions, phishing, known scam)
- `GET /api/v1/approval_security/{chain_id}` — Approval / allowance risk check for a spender contract

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet (`exact_permit`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}'
```

The same path is also served on BSC (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) at `https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/...`.

Pay with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

GoPlus 安全 API 的 x402 网关:扫描代币合约与钱包地址风险——貔貅、买卖税、增发/黑名单/代理权限以及已知恶意地址,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 兑换前的安全筛查。
- 转账或授权前的地址风险检查。
- Agent 交易流中的自动尽调。

## 接口

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/api/v1/address_security/{address}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /api/v1/approval_security/{chain_id}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/api/v1/approval_security/{chain_id}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网(`exact_permit`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}'
```

同一路径在 BSC(`eip155:56`,`exact_permit`)上也提供。使用 x402 CLI 付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

zh-CN.subtitle: 交易前安全筛查:兑换、转账与授权。

providers.title: GoPlus
providers.use_case: Use before buying a token, approving an allowance, or sending to an address: check if a token is a honeypot/scam, whether an address is malicious, and whether an approval is risky.
